# Inspect Flow

> Workflow orchestration for Inspect AI

## Welcome

- [Introduction](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/index.html.md#introduction)
- [Getting Started](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/index.html.md#getting-started)
- [Basic Example](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/index.html.md#basic-example)
- [Matrix Functions](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/index.html.md#matrix-functions)
- [Run Evaluations](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/index.html.md#run-evaluations)
- [After Running](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/index.html.md#after-running)

## Using Flow

- [Spec](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/spec.html.md): FlowSpec, FlowTask, FlowModel, FlowSolver, FlowAgent, FlowScorer, FlowOptions, FlowDefaults, FlowDependencies.
- [Defaults](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/defaults.html.md): Defaults, inheritance, and overrides for configuration.
- [Matrixing](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/matrix.html.md): Parameter sweeping with matrix functions for systematic exploration.
- [Running Flows](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/run.html.md): How to run flows, execution modes, and CLI flags.
- [Store](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/store.html.md): Persistent log store for reuse across runs.
- [Steps](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/steps.html.md): Post-evaluation workflows — tag, validate, copy, and promote logs with composable steps.
- [Advanced](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/advanced.html.md): Execution modes and virtual environments.

## Reference

- [inspect_flow.api](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/reference/inspect_flow.api.html.md): Public API — run, check, steps, config, store helpers.
- [inspect_flow](https://meridianlabs-ai.github.io/inspect_flow/reference/inspect_flow.html.md): Core types, decorators, and matrix functions.
